name: Grilled Red Pepper Butter
recipeIngredient: 1 Red bell pepper, roasted and seeded
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together with the softened butter.
2. Place the mixture on a sheet of plastic wrap or wax paper.
3. Form it into a cylinder and place in the refrigerator to harden.
4. To serve, cut pats from the log and place on top of grilled fish, poultry, or meat.
5. Makes 16 pats. The butter can be made up to 3 days in advance or frozen for up to a month.
